creator: bsam@ipt.ru
text:
Sorry, but there are some more issues. Please, take a look at
/etc/mtree/BSD.local.dist. Those directories which belongs to FreeBSD
mtree shouldn't be removed (i.e. even @dirrmtry'ed).

Thanks for your patience. Seems you have got not the most convenient
committer here. ;-)

-----
